title: melilotus indicus
intro: Melilotus indicus, also known as Indian sweet clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Melilotus indicus include reducing pain and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations.
